yakudoc.description: Show JSDoc hover, completion and signature help translated into your language (Japanese by default) — without touching the source code.
yakudoc.command.init.title: Run setup (init)
yakudoc.command.toggle.title: Toggle translated docs (original / translated)
yakudoc.command.registerPlugin.title: Register plugin in tsconfig.json
yakudoc.command.extract.title: Extract JSDoc to translate (extract)
yakudoc.command.showStatus.title: Show translation progress (status)
yakudoc.config.enabled.description: Replace JSDoc shown in hover / completion / signature help with translations
